title: Add top-right Settings button that exposes Privacy Policy link

requirements.text: Add a new Settings button in the app header (top-right area) alongside the existing Theme and Language buttons.

quotes: en üst sağ kısma bir tane ayarlar butonu ekle oradan göreyim

acceptanceCriteria: A Settings (gear) button is visible in the header’s right-side button group on both mobile and desktop breakpoints.
The Settings button styling is consistent with the existing header buttons (theme-aware colors, focus ring, min tap target).

requirements.text: When the Settings button is clicked/tapped, open a settings popup/panel that includes a clearly visible "Privacy Policy" link that opens https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy in a new tab/window.

quotes: en üst sağ kısma bir tane ayarlar butonu ekle oradan göreyim

acceptanceCriteria: Tapping the Settings button opens a popup/panel anchored to the header (similar interaction pattern to existing Theme/Language popups).
The popup/panel contains a "Privacy Policy" link labeled in English exactly as "Privacy Policy".
Clicking the "Privacy Policy" link opens https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy with target=_blank and rel="noopener noreferrer".
The popup/panel can be dismissed (e.g., tapping outside or pressing a close action) without breaking existing Theme/Language popups.

requirements.text: Keep the existing footer "Privacy Policy" link as-is; the new Settings entry point must be an additional way to access the same URL.

quotes: en üst sağ kısma bir tane ayarlar butonu ekle oradan göreyim

acceptanceCriteria: The footer still renders the existing "Privacy Policy" link and continues to work after the header Settings changes.
The Privacy Policy URL is identical in both places (https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy).

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose them instead if needed).
Do not modify immutable hook files (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
nonGoals: Building a full Settings page with additional app preferences beyond providing access to the Privacy Policy link.
Backend/canister changes (no new Motoko APIs required).
